name: pacifica
description: Pacífica Panadería — premium WordPress build (block theme + pacifica-core plugin). Root workspace: tooling, local dev, and asset builds.
author: Pacífica Panadería — Agency Build

scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
scripts.env:install-content: wp-env run cli wp pacifica install
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('\n[pacifica] Node deps installed. Next: `composer install` (PHP tooling), then `npm run env:start` to boot the local WordPress, then `npm run build` to compile future SCSS/JS entries. See docs/setup.md.')"
